vocabulary.name: Airstack API Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Vocabulary terms derived from the Airstack Farcaster Hub REST API and Webhooks API OpenAPI specifications.

terms.definition: A Farcaster message post (similar to a tweet), identified by FID and hash.
A unique identifier for a Farcaster cast, consisting of the author FID and message hash.
An embedded URL or cast reference within a Farcaster cast.
A Farcaster reaction (like or recast) on a cast.
A social link relationship between two Farcaster users (follow).
Profile metadata for a Farcaster user such as display name, bio, or profile image.
A cryptographic proof linking a Farcaster FID to an Ethereum address.
Proof that a Farcaster username (ENS or fname) is controlled by the given FID.
Farcaster ID — a unique integer identifier assigned to each Farcaster user.
An event emitted by a Farcaster Hub when a message is merged, pruned, or revoked.
An enum indicating the Farcaster network (mainnet or testnet).
Statistics about the state of the Hub's data store.
An on-chain event recorded on the Farcaster contracts (id registry, key registry, storage registry).
A configured HTTP callback endpoint registered to receive Farcaster Hub events from Airstack.
A filter definition that restricts which Hub events trigger a webhook callback.
A cursor token used for paginating through large result sets from the Airstack Hub API.
